user.title: Connect to Tydom hub
user.description:
Enter the MAC address and **one** of the two authentication options:
- **PIN code**: the code printed on the sticker on the bottom of the hub
- **Delta Dore account**: email + password from the Delta Dore mobile app

data_description.mac: Format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF — found on the sticker on the bottom of the hub
data_description.host: Leave empty for automatic mDNS discovery. Fill in if auto-discovery fails.
data_description.password: 6-digit code on the sticker. Leave empty if using Delta Dore account credentials.
data_description.deltadore_email: Delta Dore app login. Used if PIN is missing or no longer works.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the hub. Check your MAC address, PIN code and IP address.
error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address. Expected format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF
error.missing_credentials: Please provide either the PIN code or Delta Dore account credentials.
error.cloud_password_not_found: Delta Dore login succeeded but Tydom password was not found in the account.
error.cannot_connect_cloud: Cannot reach Delta Dore API. Check your credentials and internet connection.

abort.already_configured: This Tydom hub is already configured.
